final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tri-fold travel brochure for a 4-day, 3-night 杭州 self-guided itinerary, with a real 杭州 map as the central spine and landmark-illustrated panels floating on cardstock.

Style/medium: needs a travel-attack-card / illustrated-brochure aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be tri-fold layout with real 杭州 map as central spine, 4 day-panels divided clearly, landmark icons floating with shadow above cardstock surface
Subject: must include all scenic spots, dining, and tips across 4 day-panels:
  Day 1 (西湖经典游): 断桥残雪 / 白堤 / 孤山 / 曲院风荷 / 苏堤春晓 / 花港观鱼 / 雷峰塔 / 柳浪闻莺；午餐：楼外楼（东坡肉＋龙井虾仁，人均150元）
  Day 2 (禅意杭州): 灵隐寺 / 飞来峰造像 / 法喜寺 / 宋城；晚餐：素描餐厅（榴莲烤鸡＋焦糖布丁，人均90元）
  Day 3 (九溪烟树徒步): 九溪十八涧 / 龙井村 / 十里琅珰 / 云栖竹径；晚餐：茶人村（私房桂鱼＋香芋煲，人均120元）
  Day 4A (运河文艺线): 拱宸桥 / 桥西历史街区 / 小河直街 / 大兜路香积寺；Day 4B (西溪湿地): 周家村 / 深潭口 / 氦气球俯瞰湿地
Scene/backdrop: must be a real 杭州 map base with all routes connecting day-panels geographically
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, inviting travel-guide atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking 江南 watercolor freshness — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include paper cardstock surface with floating shadow beneath each landmark cutout panel
Text (verbatim): must include itinerary copy on each panel — verbatim content per day as follows:
  Day 1: "西湖经典游" / 路线：断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺 / 午餐：楼外楼（东坡肉+龙井虾仁）人均150元 / 避坑：租共享单车5元/小时
  Day 2: "禅意杭州" / 路线：灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城 / 晚餐：素描餐厅 人均90元
  Day 3: "九溪烟树徒步" / 路线：九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径 / 晚餐：茶人村 人均120元
  Day 4A: "运河文艺线" 拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街→大兜路香积寺 / Day 4B: "西溪湿地" 周家村→深潭口→氦气球180元
  伴手礼：南宋胡记荷花酥38元/盒、万事利丝绸方巾150-300元
  交通：萧山机场→西湖 地铁1号线7元/50分钟；灵隐寺专线 龙翔桥乘7W路5元
Constraints: must preserve real geographic accuracy of 杭州 map; all 4 day-panels must be visible in tri-fold layout; all 景点 names preserved; landmark icons must have distinct architectural character matching each site
Avoid:
